## Commit
`e891bfd3b6014c3aa455b7108dbdf2015657e1e3` — `feat(api): TranscriptIngestService honors Idempotency-Key replay` (2 files changed, 65 insertions, 1 deletion)

## Self-Review
- Cache key is `$"{tenant.TenantId}:{cmd.IdempotencyKey}"` (tenant-scoped — different-tenants test passes)
- Null/empty `IdempotencyKey` -> `cacheKey is null` -> caching skipped on both read and write paths
- First call: cache miss -> writer.StoreAsync invoked -> result cached. Second call: cache hit -> deserialized + returned without touching writer (Moq verified `Times.Once`)
- Constructor unchanged; `IdempotencyCache` DI registration untouched
- 4/4 service tests + 14/14 regression tests green
- Exactly 2 files in the commit
